meta-description: Learn about annual combined deductibles by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Annual deductible combined
excerpt: Usually in Health Savings Account (HSA) eligible plans, the total amount that family members on a plan must pay out-of-pocket for health care or prescription drugs before the health plan begins to pay.
content: Usually in Health Savings Account (HSA) eligible plans, the total amount that family members on a plan must pay out-of-pocket for health care or prescription drugs before the health plan begins to pay.
